rulings.Case Title: 690 MARKET CLUB OWNERS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. 690 MARKET MASTER ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Third Cause Of Action For Aiding And Abetting A Breach Of Fiduciary Duty As A Strategic Lawsuit Against Public Participation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 16, 2025 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN PERLMAN , AN INDIVIDUAL, MICHAEL MAYER Notice Of Motion To Strike Third Cause Of Action For Aiding And Abetting A Breach Of Fiduciary Duty As A Strategic Lawsuit Against Public Participation is continued to January 29, 2025 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY KIM VS. ALFONSO VILLEDA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 16, 2025 line 3. DEFENDANT ALFONSO VILLEDA DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to attach a copy of the lease or to allege a reason for failure to attach. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. rulings.Case Title: LEILANI MERRILL VS. CALVIN FRANCIS GALDAL-GIBBS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT In Favor Of Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 16, 2025 line 4. PLAINTIFF LEILANI MERRILL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication In Favor Of Plaintiff is GRANTED. Plaintiff shifted their burden. No triable issues of fact exist.
